ddls:
CREATE TABLE "storm_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "storm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the storm this data point belongs to */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the storm observation */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the storm observation */,
  "observation_time" TEXT /* Time of the storm observation */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed at the time of observation */,
  "pressure" TEXT /* Pressure at the time of observation */,
  "storm_status" TEXT /* Status of the storm (e.g., TROPICAL DEPRESSION, TROPICAL STORM) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "data_source_time" TEXT /* Time the data was received from the source */,
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Version of the data point */,
  "data_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the data point */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data point */,
  "data_source_metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the data source */,
  "data_quality_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the data point is of high quality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_storm_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_storm_data_storm_id FOREIGN KEY ("storm_id") REFERENCES storms ("storm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "storms" (
  "storm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each storm */,
  "storm_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the storm */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the storm */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the storm */,
  "initial_status" TEXT /* Initial status of the storm */,
  "final_status" TEXT /* Final status of the storm */,
  "storm_category" TEXT /* Category of the storm (e.g., Tropical Depression, Tropical Storm) */,
  "storm_track" TEXT /* JSON or XML representation of the storm's track over time */,
  "storm_intensity_changes" TEXT /* JSON or XML representation of the storm's intensity changes over time */,
  "storm_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image or map of the storm */,
  "storm_summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the storm's impact and characteristics */,
  "storm_coordinates_history" TEXT /* JSON or XML representation of the storm's coordinates over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("storm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_storms_final_status FOREIGN KEY ("final_status") REFERENCES storm_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_storms_initial_status FOREIGN KEY ("initial_status") REFERENCES storm_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_storms_storm_category FOREIGN KEY ("storm_category") REFERENCES storm_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., Satellite, Ground Station) */,
  "source_location" TEXT /* Location of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "data_source_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  "data_source_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the data collected */,
  "data_source_status" TEXT /* Current status of the data source */,
  "data_source_last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last data update from the source */,
  "data_source_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "storm_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each storm category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the storm category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the storm category */,
  "category_threshold" TEXT /* Wind speed threshold for the category */,
  "category_severity" INTEGER /* Severity level of the storm category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "storm_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each storm status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the storm status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the storm status */,
  "status_threshold" TEXT /* Wind speed threshold for the status */,
  "status_severity" INTEGER /* Severity level of the storm status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "storm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the storm the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity verification */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the file content */,
  "file_version" INTEGER /* Version of the data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_storm_id FOREIGN KEY ("storm_id") REFERENCES storms ("storm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "storm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the storm the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the readme file */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity verification */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the file content */,
  "file_version" INTEGER /* Version of the readme file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_storm_id FOREIGN KEY ("storm_id") REFERENCES storms ("storm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "user_location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "storm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the storm being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the storm data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the storm data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the data was accessed */,
  "access_duration" REAL /* Duration of the access session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_storm_id FOREIGN KEY ("storm_id") REFERENCES storms ("storm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "storm_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each storm model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the storm model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the storm model (e.g., Statistical, Numerical) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the storm model */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model's predictions */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "model_last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last model update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that made the prediction */,
  "storm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the storm being predicted */,
  "prediction_time" TEXT /* Time of the prediction */,
  "predicted_latitude" REAL /* Predicted latitude of the storm */,
  "predicted_longitude" REAL /* Predicted longitude of the storm */,
  "predicted_wind_speed" REAL /* Predicted wind speed of the storm */,
  "predicted_pressure" TEXT /* Predicted pressure of the storm */,
  "predicted_status" TEXT /* Predicted status of the storm */,
  "prediction_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the prediction */,
  "prediction_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "prediction_source" TEXT /* Source of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES storm_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_storm_id FOREIGN KEY ("storm_id") REFERENCES storms ("storm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "storm_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each storm report */,
  "storm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the storm the report belongs to */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., Summary, Detailed Analysis) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_author" TEXT /* Name of the report author */,
  "report_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for easy search and filtering */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the report */,
  "report_version" INTEGER /* Version of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_storm_reports_storm_id FOREIGN KEY ("storm_id") REFERENCES storms ("storm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "storm_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each storm update */,
  "storm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the storm being updated */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Time of the update */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "update_reason" TEXT /* Detailed reason for the update */,
  "update_source" TEXT /* Source of the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_storm_updates_storm_id FOREIGN KEY ("storm_id") REFERENCES storms ("storm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_storm_updates_updated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "storm_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact */,
  "storm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the storm causing the impact */,
  "impact_type" TEXT /* Type of impact */,
  "impact_location" TEXT /* Location of the impact */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* Description of the impact */,
  "impact_severity" INTEGER /* Severity level of the impact */,
  "impact_time" TEXT /* Time when the impact occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_storm_impact_storm_id FOREIGN KEY ("storm_id") REFERENCES storms ("storm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "storm_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "storm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the storm the alert is for */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert */,
  "alert_level" INTEGER /* Severity level of the alert */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was issued */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_storm_alerts_storm_id FOREIGN KEY ("storm_id") REFERENCES storms ("storm_id")
)
